steps.title: Find the agreement
steps.content: Mercer's team says the Antarctic environment severely restricts microbial survival. Text 2 argues that even if a few microbes are present, their scarcity would show how challenging the conditions are.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported details
steps.content: A compares dryness and temperature, B predicts a much higher count in another sample, and C introduces microbe size. Both authors would agree that most microbes probably cannot withstand the soil conditions at the Antarctic site. The answer is D.
